title: Fatty Pillowy German Krapao Tacos
description: A unique twist on traditional Mexican tacos, this recipe combines the flavors of Thai holy basil krapao with the heartiness of German cuisine, all in a kosher-friendly molcajete vessel.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in the molcajete over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the holy basil and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Warm tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a portion of the krapao mixture onto a tortilla and serving immediately.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F.
